svg.text: Three co-designed modules: raw market data → mean-field equilibrium → risk-constrained execution
zt = μ φ (I t ) + ε · σ φ (I t )
ℒ = ℒrecon + β · KL(q ‖ p) + λ · ℒ pred
EWC penalty preserves past regime knowledge
Var(μ̂) ≥ στ ² / Δt + ν η (ℝ)
Calibration: BPV → σ_τ² · RV − BPV → ν_η
Vθ(z,t) minimizes PDE residual over Sobol samples
DGM gating prevents vanishing gradients in deep PDE nets
Each outer iter: re-solve HJB → propagate particle cloud
Warm start from yesterday's cloud: ~12 iters vs. ~50
Convergence rate confirmed at ρ ≈ 0.72 on synthetic S&P 500
Lasry-Lions monotonicity → uniqueness of (V*, m*) pair
Λt = ℒV(zt) / V(zt) computed every 15 min
Λt > 0.85 → halve leverage, CVaR tightens to 2%
Paper: Alpaca API (free, no capital required)
Crises = local Lyapunov violations · Λt leads prices
V*(z,t) value func. · m*(z,t) agent dist.
w* ∈ ℝᴺ portfolio weights · Λ_t regime flag
